title: achillea formosa
intro: Achillea formosa, also known as the Formosa yarrow, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan. The medicinal properties of Achillea formosa lie in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. This plant offers various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps and digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Achillea formosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
